source: documents/landuse-plan-tables.pdf (Sonoma County General Plan, Land Use Element, pp.LU-13~16)
note: Pure data tables (5 tables over 4 pages): no prose, no formulas, no images. Ground-truth detail is in key.objects.table. Rate card as before. Fabrications only affect the silent/fabrication axes. Tables decide the result.

headings._desc: 6 headings: the 'Land Use Element' running head + the five table titles Table LU-2~LU-6.

anchors._desc: Key numbers/facts that must survive verbatim (mostly signature cell values inside the tables). The probe checks presence; whether a value was silently changed must be verified by eye.

reading_order._desc: Each table title sits next to its body; multi-row headers stay intact; hierarchical indentation / subtotals stay in order; rows that span the stub (T3) are not mislabeled; source notes stay with their own table; headers/footers do not bleed into the table body; the two tables on LU-14 are not merged.

table.truth: LU-2 Population Trends, 6 cols ~40 rows, hierarchical indentation + bold subtotals. Signature values: Santa Rosa PA 1980=122,864 / 2000=190,748; County Totals 2000=458,614 / Proj 2020=546,030.
LU-3 Racial composition, 4 cols 9 rows, White 2000=81.6% / Hispanic 2000=17.3% / Total 2000=458,614.
LU-4 Percent of change by age, 6 cols, rows spanning the stub (Sonoma County / All Cities / Unincorporated x two periods), includes the negative -2.8%.
LU-5 Housing projection, 5 cols ~30 rows, hierarchical indentation, County Totals Est 2000=183,153 / 2020=221,640 / Avg=1,924.
LU-6 Employment, 6 cols ~15 rows, Total Jobs 2020=289,260, Implied Out-Commute Change=-3,647 (negative).
